---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new algorithm, scenario, or capability
title: "[feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Motivation

What problem are you trying to solve, or what scientific question are you
trying to answer? Cite the relevant paper / TR if applicable.

## Proposed change

What would the public surface look like? (New algorithm class? New scenario
config? New runner option?)

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches have you considered, and why is this the right one?

## Scope

- Does this change the simulation contract (channel / codebook / BPLM)?
- Does this require new dependencies?
- Does this break determinism under common random numbers?

## Additional context

References, prior implementations, or links to related issues.
